definition.meaning: Companionship, friendly association with others; an organized community of people
definition.origin: From Old French societe "company" (12c.), from Latin societatem "fellowship, association, alliance, union, community"

definition.meaning: Companion, ally, associate, comrade, business partner
definition.origin: From PIE *sokw-yo-, suffixed form of root *sekw- "to follow"

definition.meaning: To follow (root of socius, society, sequel, second)
definition.note: The concept of society derives from "those who follow together"

definition.meaning: cumann: society, association, club, fellowship; sochaí: community, populace
definition.origin: cumann from Old Irish cumaṅ "obligation, bond"

definition.meaning: Genossenschaft: cooperative, fellowship (from Genosse "companion"); Gemeinschaft: community (from gemein "common")
definition.note: Germanic languages formed society-concepts from "companion" or "common" roots rather than borrowing from Latin
